## Summary
Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] test: adding tests
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] refactor: code refactoring
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass: `py -m pytest tests/unit/ -v`
- [ ] API tested locally
- [ ] Streamlit UI tested locally

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Docstrings added
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials
